constrained: Resolve one top recipe and one structured direction with exactly six selected rule ids: one compatible id from each rule family.
Compare the direction with the selected recipe good/bad example pack before implementation.
Implement only from existing primitives and verified patterns.
Run one mandatory corrective pass followed by fresh evidence.
A no-acceptable-variant outcome must block without repair; a selected outcome always enters repair-requested.
standard: A no-acceptable-variant outcome must block; a selected outcome with repair findings enters repair-requested, while zero repair findings enters no-repair-needed.
advanced: Allow new primitives only with product evidence and destructive critique.
A no-acceptable-variant outcome must block; a selected outcome with repair findings enters repair-requested, while zero repair findings enters no-repair-needed.
